name: 2pk Slim Open Storage Bins Clear - Brightroom™: Stackable Plastic Utility, Universal Nesting, 7.1 Volume, Spring Organization
description:
You're sure to love the organization this 2-Pack of Slim Open Storage Bins from Brightroom™ brings to your space. These storage bins feature a slim, rectangular silhouette with a flat base for storing anything from wallets to small accessories and beyond. The open top allows for easy access to the contents, while the stackable design offers space-saving storage. This pack includes two slim-sized storage bins, each featuring a clear construction for easy identification of the contents from the outside, while two side integrated handles make carrying a breeze.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
